title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves 2 Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded. The NC State Bureau of Investigation is investigating.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on community spaces, demanding immediate attention and action.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host the 2026 Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and collaboration in polymer science, fostering economic growth and technological advancement in the region.

title: 8-Year-Old Injured in Hit-and-Run Near Quail Hollow Middle School
summary: An 8-year-old child suffered serious injuries in a hit-and-run incident near Quail Hollow Middle School on Saturday. Police are investigating.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about pedestrian safety, especially around schools, and the need for increased vigilance and traffic enforcement.

title: Former Mayor Roberts Offers to Serve as Interim Mayor
summary: Former Charlotte Mayor Jennifer Roberts has offered to serve as unpaid interim mayor following Vi Lyles' departure, pledging not to seek another term in 2027.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the transition in local leadership and the potential for experienced figures to step in during critical periods.

title: Gaston County Gynecologist Accused of Sexual Assault
summary: A Gaston County gynecologist is facing a lawsuit alleging sexual assault during a routine exam. The doctor was previously reprimanded for sharing patient photos.
charlotte_impact: Underscores the importance of patient safety and ethical conduct in healthcare, highlighting the consequences of professional misconduct.

title: Arson Investigation Underway After Apartment Fire
summary: An arson investigation is underway after a weekend apartment fire in north Charlotte sent heavy smoke billowing from four units. Police are investigating.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risk of arson and its impact on residential communities, emphasizing the need for fire safety and prevention measures.

title: Pleasant Temperatures, Scattered Rain and Storms Expected
summary: A cold front will bring a few showers and thunderstorms on Monday, with sunshine returning by Tuesday. Expect pleasant temperatures.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather forecast, helping residents plan their activities and prepare for potential weather changes.

title: Fire Breaks Out at Davidson College Fraternity House
summary: A fire at Davidson College's Kappa Sigma fraternity house prompted a swift multi-department response early Sunday. No injuries were reported.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of fire safety in campus housing and the effectiveness of emergency response systems.

title: Two Dead After Late-Night House Fire in Rowan County
summary: Crews responded to a house fire on the 200 block of Saw Road in Rowan County just before midnight Sunday, where two people were found dead.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the tragic consequences of residential fires and the need for fire safety awareness and prevention.

title: Suspect Found Hiding in Ceiling of Gastonia Hospital
summary: Two suspects were arrested after Flock surveillance cameras flagged them driving stolen motorcycles. One suspect was found hiding in the ceiling of a Gastonia hospital.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the use of surveillance technology in crime prevention and the lengths to which suspects will go to evade capture.

title: National Nurses Week: Local NICU Nurse Making a Difference
summary: A local NICU nurse is highlighted for her dedication and care, making a significant difference in the lives of newborns and their families during National Nurses Week.
charlotte_impact: Recognizes the vital role of nurses in healthcare and their positive impact on patients and the community.

title: Kristoffer Reitan Wins Truist Championship in Charlotte
summary: Kristoffer Reitan of Norway secured a two-shot victory at the Truist Championship in Charlotte, marking his first PGA Tour win.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte as a venue for prestigious sporting events and celebrates athletic achievement.

title: Overnight Shooting Leaves Two Dead in Charlotte
summary: Police responded to a shooting on the 4900 block of Rozzelles Ferry Road in Charlotte, where two people were found dead.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence in Charlotte and the need for effective crime prevention strategies.

title: Charlotte City Council to Decide on Mayor Lyles' Replacement
summary: Charlotte City Council has less than two months to decide who will fill Mayor Vi Lyles' seat. The selection process is expected to be outlined in June.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the upcoming transition in local leadership and the process for selecting a new mayor.

title: Neighbors Oppose Proposed Data Center in East Charlotte
summary: East Charlotte neighbors, represented by Action NC, are pushing back on a proposed data center, calling for stronger regulations and more public input.
charlotte_impact: Reflects community concerns about infrastructure development and the importance of public engagement in urban planning decisions.
